Transforming My Pink Secret Room: Adding Color and Fun

my kids love this room so much. All the colour, all the imagination, all the creativity. I never used to be able to keep them in here. They would make their way out into the lounge with all the toys. Now they stay in here, playing, reading, drawing, dancing. It’s pure bliss. What a joy it is for me to be able to fill their walls with fun, colourful art 🥰

my ✨dopamine decor✨ is lots of pink, texture, waves, artwork, thrifted items, Pokémon, and all the fake food! 🍓💗🎀 I can’t help but think if these lame  arbitrary rules of what is “appropriate” adult home decor weren’t so heavily enforced by society, you’d see a lot more spaces that truly express the people who live there! 😤💓
